title: Terpenoids LIX-A Synthesis of α-Farnesene
author: O. P. VIG
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A synthesis of α-farnesene, starting from citral through the application of Wittig and modified Wittig reactions, is described.
steps_raw: A synthesis of α-farnesene, starting from citral through the application of Wittig and modified Wittig reactions, is described.
